name: Chaos End Ruler - Ruler of the Beginning and the End
name_jp: カオスエンド・ルーラー－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>開</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>闢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>と<ruby lang="jp"><rb>終</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>焉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>支</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>配</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Endo Rūrā -Kaibyaku to Shūen no Shihaisha-
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT Warrior and 1 DARK Fiend monster from your GY. This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. Neither player can activate cards or effects when this card is Special Summoned. If you control this card that was Summoned its own way: You can pay 1000 LP; banish as many cards from your opponent's field and GY as possible, then inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each card banished by this effect. You can only use this effect of "Chaos End Ruler - Ruler of the Beginning and the End" once per turn.

You can only use this effect of "Chaos End Ruler - Ruler of the Beginning and the End" once per turn.
